name: elevator-request-system
description: ElevatorOS - Smart Building Elevator Request System

scripts.postinstall: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.postbuild:client: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');function copy(s,d){fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});fs.readdirSync(s).forEach(f=>{const sp=path.join(s,f),dp=path.join(d,f);fs.statSync(sp).isDirectory()?copy(sp,dp):fs.copyFileSync(sp,dp)});}if(fs.existsSync('server/public'))fs.rmSync('server/public',{recursive:true});copy('client/dist','server/public');console.log('Build copied to server/public');"
